title.en: At this time, Ye Tian's endless golden light ca...

content.en:
Thundered!!!

Under the suppression of the Endless Black Domain, the Nine Swords Ancestor was completely suppressed.

Click!

His Thousand Tribulation Sword body was cracked, and the Primordial Saint Soldier Long Sword in his hand was also cracked by Ye Tian.

At this time, Ye Tian's endless golden light came again.

The Nine Swords Ancestor used a defensive perfection-level natal primordial control technique, the Thousand Realms Sword Cover, but it was still pierced by the endless golden light.

"Damn, how could there be such a perverted Quadruple Peak Ancestor!!"

The Nine Swords Ancestor was completely confused.

Moreover, Ye Tian did not show his will pagoda from beginning to end, and only used a door natal primordial control technique, and it seemed that he did not explode his combat power with all his strength.

Therefore, he couldn't figure out how many extreme extreme paths Ye Tian had comprehended, but he definitely had more than him.

You may even have comprehended three hundred and sixty-five extreme paths!

"Impossible, I have paid a huge price, and my master is still a sixfold ancestor, he has prepared a large number of resources and treasures for me, and has taken me to countless treasure lands, I have exhausted countless years, so I can comprehend two hundred and eighty-eight extreme extreme paths, this is already the limit, how can he comprehend three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths!!

The Nine Swords Ancestor couldn't believe it.

But if it weren't for the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extremes, how could the other party be so demonic?

If it is really three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, then the natal primordial control technique used by the other party is absolutely superior.

In this way, even if the other party is a fourfold peak ancestor, he can crush him.

"Three hundred and sixty-five extreme extremes, it is said that in the infinite and long era, such a person was born in the primeval plain realm, but what a long time ago, and now another one was born!"

The Nine Swords Ancestor said secretly.

Of course, he is only guessing, and he is not completely sure.

Soon, his injuries became more and more serious, and he could no longer bear them, and the many life-saving treasures on his body were also exhausted.

Finally.

An endless golden light struck, directly shattering his body and annihilating it.

"More than 80,000 primordial gold beads, this harvest is too great!"

Ye Tian happily put away the resources of the Nine Swords Origin Ancestor and the Primordial Gold Bead, and said with a smile.

......

Outside.

Many Origin Ancestors looked at the Ten Thousand Xuan List, and suddenly saw that the name of the Nine Swords Origin Ancestor had disappeared, and the ranking of the Endless Origin Ancestor had suddenly soared to the first place.

Seeing this scene, these Fivefold Primordial Ancestors and Half-Step Sixfold Primordial Ancestors, even if they were stupid, knew what was going on.

"Impossible, how could the Nine Swords Ancestor be killed?"

A half-step sixfold ancestor was shocked.

"The Nine Swords Ancestor was actually killed, he is the disciple of that adult, that is the personal disciple of the Sixfold Ancestor, it is said that he has also comprehended two hundred and eighty-eight kinds of extreme Dao, has five kinds of natal primordial control techniques, has many hole cards, and after entering the primordial golden realm, his cultivation must have reached the half-step fivefold ancestor. With such strength, even if it is a weaker Fivefold Ancestor, it is not his opponent. "

"The Nine Swords Origin Ancestor has the lives of dozens of Fivefold Origin Ancestors in his hands, and his strength is killed, but I didn't expect his will clone to be killed in the Primordial Golden Domain, and all the gains this time are gone!"

"The Nine Swords Ancestor is a disciple of that adult, and there is no shortage of these resources. "

"Endless Origin Ancestor, the one in the Shangling Origin Domain, actually killed the first place in the Ten Thousand Xuan List, could this be a genius secretly cultivated by the Shangling Origin Domain?"

"The Upper Spirit Origin Domain doesn't even have a Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, I didn't expect to cultivate such a demon!"

......

"Secret cultivation?"

The Heavenly Tooth Holy Ancestor knew very well what the situation was, the Void Tooth Holy Gate didn't have much cultivation for Ye Tian at all, it wasn't that he didn't want to cultivate, it was that Ye Tian's growth rate was too fast, and Ye Tian himself had obtained a large amount of resources, so he was not lacking in resources.

Therefore, they also let Ye Tian practice by himself, and did not give many good things.

But he never expected that Ye Tian would crush the half-step fivefold origin ancestors of many high-level origin domains in the entire primeval realm, and directly killed the first place on the Ten Thousand Xuan List, what kind of strength is this!

Moreover, this time it was Ye Tian who killed the Nine Swords Ancestor, so no one would think that it was luck!

"This is the luck of our Void Tooth Holy Gate!!"

The Heavenly Crescent Saint Ancestor said excitedly.

As long as Ye Tian becomes a Fivefold Origin Ancestor, he will definitely be almost invincible among the Fivefold Ancestors, and at that time, with the resources of the entire Void Tooth Holy Gate, there may be hope that Ye Tian's cultivation will be piled up to the peak realm of the Fivefold Origin Ancestor in a short period of time.

At that time, I'm afraid that I will directly crush those half-step six-fold ancestors!

With such a strong person, the Void Tooth Holy Gate still needs to worry about the Nine Light Holy Gate?

The entire Nine Light Holy Gate was only two half-step sixfold ancestors, which was not enough for Ye Tian to kill alone.

Of course, the premise of everything is that Ye Tian can grow up.

"If you go back and let Ye Tian's body not come out of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, then there will be no problem. Those Sixfold Origin Ancestors were all big names in the Primeval Origin Realm, and it was impossible to deal with the Endless Origin Ancestor, while the Void Tooth Sect Master could deal with other half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestors who were attacking!"

Meanwhile.

The other Fivefold Holy Gates of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain congratulated the Void Fang Holy Gate one after another, ostensibly congratulating, but secretly jealous.

After all, such a demon is from the Void Tooth Holy Gate, who is not jealous?

Of course, except for the Nine Light Holy Gate, the contradiction between the other Fivefold Holy Gates and the Void Fang Holy Gate was not great, so it was impossible to attack and kill Ye Tian, otherwise they could not afford the price of failure.

The high-level leaders of the Nine Lights Holy Gate were a little panicked and were thinking of countermeasures.

Time passed slowly, and there were fewer and fewer Primordial Ancestors in the Primordial Golden Domain, and even many half-step Fivefold Primordial Ancestors were forced to come out under the orders of the high-level of their own forces.

After all, there is such an existence as Ye Tian who can easily kill a half-step five-fold ancestor, even the nine-step five-fold ancestor has been killed, and the other half-step five-fold ancestors can't bear it, and if they meet Ye Tian, they will die.

So, coming out now is naturally the best way to go.

However, there are still half-step fivefold ancestors who are reluctant to come out.

So, he was caught by Ye Tian and killed a few half-step fivefold ancestors.

Finally, on this day, there was only one original ancestor left in the Primordial Golden Domain, Ye Tian, and all the other original ancestors were withdrawn.

Ye Tian searched for a long time, but he didn't find any other original ancestors, but there were still very few original gold beads left in the original golden realm, and it took Ye Tian a long time to collect them all.

"It's time to leave, there's no point in looking for it any longer, and this group of original ancestors is too timid, they all ran away!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But he didn't want to think about it, even the Nine Swords Ancestor had been killed, although there were several Ancestors who were comparable to the Nine Swords Ancestor, and maybe even a little more powerful than the Nine Swords Ancestor.

However, Ye Tian can kill the Nine Swords Ancestor, and naturally he can also kill them!

Moreover, the Nine Swords Ancestor revealed that he had no strength to resist, who would dare to stay?

In this way, Ye Tian also came out.

And Tian carried nearly 300,000 primordial gold beads on his body, which were all half-step fivefold primordial ancestors who were killed in the last few kills, and he had accumulated so many primordial gold beads at once.

After all, the half-step fivefold ancestor who lived to the end, who didn't have tens of thousands of primordial gold beads in his hand, he would have to make a lot of money if he killed one!

It's a pity that the other half-step fivefold ancestors fled into space, otherwise he would have made more money if he killed a few more!

When Ye Tian came out of the Primordial Golden Domain, the eyes of the Five-Fold Origin Ancestor and the Half-Step Six-Fold Origin Ancestor locked onto him, bringing him great coercion.

However, these five-fold ancestors and half-step six-fold ancestors did not make a move, and they didn't dare to break the agreement and attack and kill Ye Tian here, so what's the point of holding such an event?

"It's really just a Quadruple Peak Ancestor!"

A half-step sixfold ancestor was surprised.

And at this moment, the Heavenly Crescent Holy Ancestor immediately protected Ye Tian, and only then did he secretly breathe a sigh of relief.

Immediately, after he exchanged the bet, he immediately retired to the other original ancestors, and hurriedly returned with Ye Tian.
